== Notes for [[Item:Q112081|Q112081]] ==

'''Medilands (28 Feb 2019) [https://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/Galicia.htm#HermenegildoGonzalez950MMuniadomnaDiazB ''Galicia Nobility 9th–11th Centuries'']'''

https://es.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hermenegildo_Gonz%C3%A1lez

http://genealogics.org/getperson.php?personID=I00551249&tree=LEO

https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Castelo_de_Guimar%C3%A3es

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MDLdqvHSbG8

Count of Guimaranis

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
